string.name: module_desc
string.value: module description

string.name: EntryAbility_desc
string.value: description

string.name: EntryAbility_label
string.value: label

string.name: CombineAll_content
string.value: CombineAll: When the source observables are completed, use combineLast on the collected observables

string.name: CombineLatest_content
string.value: CombineLast: When any observable emits a value, it emits the latest value for each observable

string.name: Concat_content
string.value: Concat: In order, once the previous observable is completed, subscribe to the next observable and issue a value

string.name: ConcatAll_content
string.value: ConcatAll: Collect observables, subscribe to the next one when the current one is completed

string.name: ForkJoin_content
string.value: ForkCoin: When all observables are completed, issue the latest value for each observable

string.name: Merge_content
string.value: Merge: Convert multiple observables into a single observable

string.name: MergeAll_content
string.value: MergeAll: Collect and subscribe to all observables

string.name: Pairwise_content
string.value: pairwise:Send the previous and current values as an array

string.name: Race_content
string.value: Race: Use the observable that emits the value first

string.name: StartWith_content
string.value: StartWith: Send the first given value

string.name: WithLatestFrom_content
string.value: WithLatestFrom: also provides the latest value of another observable

string.name: zip_content
string.value: Zip: After all observables are emitted, send their values as an array

string.name: DefaultIfEmpty_content
string.value: DefaultIfEmpty: If no notification is issued before completion, issue the given value

string.name: Every_content
string.value: Every: If all values can be asserted upon completion, then issue true; otherwise, issue false

string.name: Buffer_content
string.value: Buffer: Collect output values until the provided observable is emitted, and then emit the collected values as an array

string.name: BufferCount_content
string.value: BufferCount: Collect the values sent out until the provided quantity of values are collected before sending them out as an array

string.name: BufferTime_content
string.value: BufferTime: Collect emitted values until the provided time has passed before sending them out as an array

string.name: BufferToggle_content
string.value: BufferToggle: Turn on the switch to capture the value emitted by the source observable, turn off the switch to emit the buffered value as an array

string.name: BufferWhen_content
string.value: BufferWhen: Collect values until the selector is closed to output the buffered value

string.name: ConcatMap_content
string.value: ConcatMap: Map values to internal observables and subscribe and issue them in order

string.name: ConcatMapTo_content
string.value: ConcatMapTo: When the current observable is completed, subscribe to the provided observable and issue a value

string.name: ExhaustMap_content
string.value: ExhaustMap: Map to an internal observable, ignore other values until the observable is complete

string.name: Expand_content
string.value: Expand: recursively call the provided function

string.name: GroupBy_content
string.value: GroupBy: Grouping multiple observables based on the provided values

string.name: Map_content
string.value: Map: Apply a projection function to each value of the source observable

string.name: MapTo_content
string.value: MapTo: Map each emitted value to a constant

string.name: MergeMap_content
string.value: MergeMap: Map to observable and emit values

string.name: Partition_content
string.value: Partition: Split an observable value into two based on the provided predicate

string.name: pluck_content
string.value: Pluck: Select attributes to send out

string.name: Reduce_content
string.value: Reduce: Merge the values of the source observable into a single value, and emit this value when the source observable is completed

string.name: Scan_content
string.value: Scan: Merge over time

string.name: SwitchMap_content
string.value: SwitchMap: Map to observable, complete the previous internal observable, and emit values

string.name: Window_content
string.value: Window: Observable value of time window

string.name: WindowCount_content
string.value: WindowCount: The observable of the values in the source observable, emitting N values at a time

string.name: WindowTime_content
string.value: WindowTime: Collect observable values from the source observable within each provided time span

string.name: WindowToggle_content
string.value: windowToggle:Starting with the issuance of Openings and ending with the issuance of ClosingSelectors, collect and concurrently output the observable values from the source observable

string.name: WindowWhen_content
string.value: windowWhen:Close the window at the provided time frame and emit the observed value collected from the source observable

string.name: Create_content
string.value: create:Use the given subscription function to create an observable

string.name: Empty_content
string.value: empty:Instantly Completed Observable

string.name: From_content
string.value: from:Convert arrays, promises, or iterators to observable

string.name: Interval_content
string.value: interval:Send out a sequence of numbers based on a given time interval

string.name: Of_content
string.value: of:Send any number of values in sequence

string.name: Rang_content
string.value: rang:Send out the numbers within the given interval in sequence

string.name: Throw_content
string.value: throw:Sending an error on the subscription

string.name: Timer_content
string.value: timer:After a given duration, send out numbers in sequence at specified intervals

string.name: FromEvent_content
string.value: fromEvent:Convert events into observable sequences (not supported)

string.name: CatchError_content
string.value: catchError:Elegantly handle errors in observable sequences

string.name: Retry_content
string.value: retry:If an error occurs, retry the observable sequence a specified number of times

string.name: RetryWhen_content
string.value: retryWhen:When an error occurs, retry the observable sequence based on custom criteria

string.name: Debounce_content
string.value: debounce:According to a selector function, discard the output values that are less than the specified time between two outputs

string.name: DebounceTime_content
string.value: debounceTime:Discard emission values that are less than the specified time between two outputs

string.name: DistinctUntilChanged_content
string.value: distinctUntilChanged:Only when the current value is different from the last previous value, will it be issued

string.name: Filter_content
string.value: filter:Send values that meet the given conditions

string.name: First_content
string.value: first:Send the first value or the first value obtained through a given expression

string.name: IgnoreElements_content
string.value: ignoreElements:Ignore all notifications except for complete and error

string.name: Last_content
string.value: last:According to the provided expression, emit its last value upon completion of the source observable

string.name: Sample_content
string.value: sample:Sample from the source observable when the provided observable is emitted

string.name: Single_content
string.value: single:Issue a single item through an expression

string.name: Skip_content
string.value: skip:Skip N (provided by parameters) emitted values

string.name: SkipUntil_content
string.value: skipUntil:Skip the value emitted by the source observable until the provided observable emits a value

string.name: SkipWhile_content
string.value: skipWhile:Skip the value emitted by the source observable until the provided expression results in false

string.name: Take_content
string.value: take:Send N values (N determined by parameters) before completion

string.name: TakeUntil_content
string.value: takeUntil:Send out a value until the provided observable sends out a value, and it is complete

string.name: TakeWhile_content
string.value: TakeWhile: Issue a value until the provided expression results in false

string.name: Throttle_content
string.value: throttle:Using a certain time interval as a threshold, the emission of new values will be suppressed until the durationselector is completed

string.name: ThrottleTime_content
string.value: throttleTime:Issue the latest value after the specified duration has passed

string.name: Create_operation
string.value: Create operation

string.name: Filtering_content
string.value: Filtering operation

string.name: Multicast_content
string.value: Multicast operation

string.name: Combined_content
string.value: combined operation

string.name: Incorrect_content
string.value: Incorrect operation

string.name: Conditional_content
string.value: Conditional operation

string.name: Conversion_content
string.value: Conversion operation

string.name: Tool_content
string.value: tool

string.name: Scheduler_content
string.value: scheduler

string.name: Publish_content
string.value: publish:Share the source observable and make it hot by calling the connect method

string.name: Multicasts_content
string.value: multicast:Use the provided Subject to share the source observable

string.name: Share_content
string.value: share:Share source observable among multiple subscribers

string.name: ShareReplay_content
string.value: shareReplay:Share the source observable and replay the specified number of occurrences

string.name: Do_tap_content
string.value: do/tap:Transparent execution of operations or side effects, such as printing logs

string.name: Delay_content
string.value: delay:Send values with a given time delay

string.name: DelayWhen_content
string.value: delayWhen:Delay sending value, the delay time is determined by the provided function

string.name: Dematerialize_content
string.value: dematerialize:Convert the notification object into a notification value

string.name: Timeout_content
string.value: timeout:Report an error if no value is issued within the specified time interval
